Title: Synthwave Neon Cityscape Sunrise Illustration Sticker
Description:
Capture the vibrant energy of a retro-futuristic metropolis with this Synthwave Neon Cityscape sticker. Designed with a nostalgic, vibrant aesthetic, this piece features glowing neon signs and towering buildings set against a dramatic orange and yellow sunrise.

It’s a perfect piece of art for lovers of vaporwave, synthwave, and retro 80s aesthetics, adding a splash of electric color to laptops, notebooks, or water bottles.

  • Vibrant Design: Features striking contrasts between deep purples/blues and glowing neon pink/cyan.
  • Retro Vibe: Taps into the iconic mood of 80s sci-fi and synthpop culture.
  • Durable Vinyl: Printed on high-quality, durable vinyl material for lasting color and adherence.
  • Gift Idea: Makes a unique and stylish gift for music lovers, digital artists, or anyone who appreciates retro aesthetics.

Whether displayed on a tech gadget or used for decoration, this sticker brings the electric pulse of a neon-soaked city to life.
